sections.title: Daily ATR Source
sections.body: ATR is calculated from daily OHLC bars. Provider order is exchange/vendor EOD or OHLC adapter first, configured futures CSV second, and public fallback only when no key-backed source is available.

sections.title: Live Cockpit Source
sections.body: The server ingests Databento GLBX.MDP3 live trades and MBP-1 top-of-book by product symbol, then publishes normalized product definitions, books, trades, bars, and spread marks to the UI.

sections.title: GOOSE Source
sections.body: GOOSE combines refreshed futures history, macro regime inputs, spread z-scores, volume context, live quote layer, public factor proxies, CFTC positioning, and available market headline feeds.

sections.title: Risk Note
sections.body: This is a risk-management framework and operator cockpit, not financial advice. Use exchange rules, broker margin, live market data, and your own risk limits before trading.
